metadata.description: Solana AI Kit — Claude Code configuration for Solana development: specialized agents, workflow commands, go-to-market skills, MCP servers, and hooks.

plugins.name: solana-ai-kit
plugins.description: Core Solana dev kit: 16 agents, 31 commands, idea→pitch→hackathon→registry→fiat-rails skills, 7 MCP servers, and dev hooks. (Full install via install.sh adds .claude/rules, the permissions/sandbox policy, and 19 ext/ submodules.)
